info.title: technical-interview-demo API
info.description: Machine-readable contract for the demo application's supported external /api/** surface. Internal-only overview, documentation, OpenAPI publication, and actuator validation paths are intentionally excluded.

tags.name: Books
tags.description: Public book reads plus authenticated write operations.

tags.name: Categories
tags.description: Public category reads with ADMIN-only category management.

tags.name: Localizations
tags.description: Public localization reads with ADMIN-only management operations.

tags.name: Session
tags.description: Same-site browser session contract endpoints for the separate first-party UI.

get.description: Public endpoint for a single localization.

put.description: Requires an authenticated session with the ADMIN role.

delete.description: Requires an authenticated session with the ADMIN role.

put.description: Requires an authenticated session with the ADMIN role.

403.description: Authenticated user does not have the ADMIN role.

delete.description: Requires an authenticated session with the ADMIN role. Categories assigned to books cannot be deleted.

403.description: Authenticated user does not have the ADMIN role.

409.description: Category is still assigned to one or more books.

get.description: Public endpoint that returns a single book with its assigned categories.

put.description: Requires an authenticated session and the current optimistic-lock version.
Requires an authenticated session. Blank or null clears the preference.

post.summary: Log out the current browser session
post.description: Same-site logout endpoint for the separate first-party UI. Invalidates the current application session if present, clears the session cookie, and returns 204 even when no session exists.

204.description: Current session invalidated and cookie cleared.

get.description: Public endpoint with pageable results. Optional messageKey and language filters narrow the collection.

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: The size of the page to be returned

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sorting criteria in the format: property,(asc|desc). Default sort order is ascending. Multiple sort criteria are supported.

post.description: Requires an authenticated session with the ADMIN role.

get.description: Public endpoint that returns categories ordered by name.

post.description: Requires an authenticated session with the ADMIN role.

403.description: Authenticated user does not have the ADMIN role.

get.description: Public endpoint with pagination, sorting, text filters, category filters, and publication-year filters.

parameters.name: title
parameters.description: Case-insensitive substring filter for the title.

schema.description: Case-insensitive substring filter for the title.

parameters.name: author
parameters.description: Case-insensitive substring filter for the author.

schema.description: Case-insensitive substring filter for the author.

parameters.name: isbn
parameters.description: Case-insensitive substring filter for the ISBN.

schema.description: Case-insensitive substring filter for the ISBN.

parameters.name: year
parameters.description: Exact publication year. Cannot be combined with yearFrom or yearTo.

schema.description: Exact publication year. Cannot be combined with yearFrom or yearTo.
Repeat the parameter to match any of multiple categories.

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: The size of the page to be returned

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sorting criteria in the format: property,(asc|desc). Default sort order is ascending. Multiple sort criteria are supported.

post.description: Requires an authenticated session established through the configured OAuth provider login flow.

get.summary: Get the current browser session contract
get.description: Public same-site session/bootstrap endpoint for the separate first-party UI. Returns the current authenticated state, persisted-account path, available OAuth login providers, logout path, cookie contract, and current CSRF mode.
Requires an authenticated session with the ADMIN role and returns audit, runtime, and operational visibility in one payload.

403.description: Authenticated user does not have the ADMIN role.

get.description: Requires an authenticated session with the ADMIN role and returns pageable audit entries.

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: The size of the page to be returned

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sorting criteria in the format: property,(asc|desc). Default sort order is ascending. Multiple sort criteria are supported.

403.description: Authenticated user does not have the ADMIN role.

get.description: Requires an authenticated session and returns the persisted application account.

messageKey.description: Stable message key managed by the application.

description.example: Displayed when a requested resource does not exist.

LocalizationRequest.description: Payload for creating or updating a localization message.

messageText.example: The requested resource was not found.

LocalizationResponse.description: Localization message returned by the API.

detail.description: Technical problem detail kept stable for debugging and logs.
detail.example: Authentication is required to access this resource.

messageKey.description: Stable localization key for the error type.

message.description: Localized end-user message resolved from the request language.
message.example: You must authenticate before performing this operation.

language.description: Two-letter ISO 639-1 language code actually used for the localized message.

ApiProblemResponse.description: Localized ProblemDetail payload returned for API errors.

categories.description: Optional replacement list of existing category names.

BookUpdateRequest.description: Payload for updating an existing book. ISBN remains immutable.

isbn.description: Unique ISBN assigned at creation time.

Book.description: Book resource returned by the API.

preferredLanguage.description: Two-letter ISO 639-1 language code. Use null or blank to clear the preference.

UserAccountLanguageRequest.description: Payload for updating the current user's preferred language.

login.description: External login from the authenticated OAuth provider.

displayName.description: Display name from the OAuth provider.

email.description: Email address when available from the provider.

preferredLanguage.description: Preferred two-letter language code used as the last localization fallback.

roles.description: Roles assigned to the persisted user.

lastLoginAt.description: Timestamp of the latest authenticated request.

UserAccountResponse.description: Persisted application profile for the current authenticated user.

isbn.description: Unique ISBN for the new book.

categories.description: Optional list of existing category names.

BookCreateRequest.description: Payload for creating a new book.

name.description: Session cookie name expected by protected operations.

httpOnly.description: Whether the session cookie is HTTP-only.

secure.description: Whether the session cookie requires HTTPS.

SessionCookieContract.description: Session cookie settings relevant to same-site browser clients.

enabled.description: Whether CSRF protection is currently enabled for browser writes.

SessionCsrfContract.description: Current CSRF contract for browser writes.

clientName.description: Display name exposed by the configured OAuth client registration.

authorizationPath.description: Relative same-site authorization bootstrap path for the configured provider.

SessionLoginProvider.description: Available same-site OAuth login bootstrap option.

authenticated.description: Whether the current browser request is backed by an authenticated application session.

accountPath.description: Endpoint path for the authenticated persisted-account resource.

loginProviders.description: Interactive login bootstrap options for the current runtime. It is an empty array when oauth is inactive.

SessionResponse.description: Same-site browser session contract for the separate first-party UI.

actorLogin.description: Login of the acting user, or `system` for non-user writes.

auditLogEndpoint.description: Endpoint path for full audit log pagination.

totalEntries.description: Total number of audit log entries currently stored.

recentEntries.description: Most recent audit entries, newest first.

actuatorPrometheusEndpoint.description: Endpoint path for deployment-scoped Prometheus scraping.

OperatorOperationalStatus.description: Operational status links and current readiness state.

technicalOverviewEndpoint.description: Endpoint path for the full technical overview.

totalElements.description: Total number of matching audit log entries.

last.description: Whether this page is the last page.

numberOfElements.description: Number of audit entries returned in the current page.

first.description: Whether this page is the first page.

empty.description: Whether the page content is empty.

sessionCookie.description: Authenticated browser session cookie used by protected operations. It is established through a configured identity provider login path under /api/session/oauth2/authorization/{registrationId} when the optional oauth profile is active.
sessionCookie.name: technical-interview-demo-session
